raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context setter","name":"Before we get specific, what’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Lin set context before the conversation narrows in.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights source","name":"What’s driving the late nights now that the launches are done?","description":"Surfaces whether the pace is still a temporary push or something else.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Default pace check","name":"What part of your current pace feels sustainable to you?","description":"Tests whether the current rhythm is workable without sounding accusatory.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Hidden load","name":"What’s taking more of your time than it should right now?","description":"Finds the work that is quietly consuming capacity and attention.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Keep or delegate","name":"What do you think only you should own right now?","description":"Gets at ownership boundaries and the rationale for keeping work close.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegate next","name":"What could move off your plate without losing quality?","description":"Surfaces delegation candidates and tests whether the team can absorb more ownership.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team leverage","name":"Where are you still the bottleneck?","description":"Identifies places where the org depends too much on Lin personally.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Decision support","name":"What do you need from me to make the next two weeks easier?","description":"Opens concrete asks for support, air cover, or decision-making help.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Focus reset","name":"What should we take off the table for now?","description":"Forces a trade-off and helps narrow the load after a heavy stretch.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Closer next step","name":"Given what we’ve covered, what’s the first thing you want to change before we meet again?","description":"Ends on a concrete next step without opening a new topic.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
